title: eucharis × stevensii
intro: Eucharis × stevensii, also known as the Gloriosa Lily or Flame Lily, is a hybrid flowering plant native to South Africa. It is known for its bright orange and red flowers, which have medicinal properties, containing compounds that have anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant has various health benefits, including reducing pain, inflammation, and improving respiratory issues due to its expectorant properties. Eucharis × stevensii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, although its use should be under the guidance of a medical professional.
